name: Listbox
description: A widget that presents a list of options allowing users to select one or more, communicating option names, states, and positions to assistive technologies.

keyboard_interactions.action: Moves focus to next option matching typed character(s)
Moves focus and toggles selection of next option
Moves focus and toggles selection of previous option

optional_attributes.description: true for multi-select; omit for single-select
true for selected; false for unselectable
horizontal for horizontal arrangement; default is vertical
Total options when not all in DOM

notes: Prefer native <select> for simple single-select use cases
Two multi-select keyboard models exist: with and without modifier keys
